title: Shop AeroTrack
intro: Explore our full range of intelligent AI-tracking gear. From compact handhelds to full studio setups.
detailDescription: This premium AeroTrack edition brings cutting-edge AI face tracking, stable 360-degree rotation, and seamless gesture controls to your fingertips. Built with sturdy materials to support both smartphones and cameras, it's perfect for vloggers, live streamers, and content creators aiming for professional results.

product_5.name: AeroTrack Pro Studio
product_5.tagline: Includes dual magnetic fill lights for live delivery.

product_8.name: AeroTrack Remote Edition
product_8.tagline: Fast charge remote Bluetooth control for free shooting.

product_9.name: AeroTrack Extendable
product_9.tagline: 1.8m wide angle stretch for outdoor shooting.
